## Source: ossf-package-analysis (6f9757e1ad29ad430d32886a0fcfa47e48a29e5e4af901f48e305216133028e6)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'advisory_db_toolkit' @ 99.99.99 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
